fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: bal-devnet-7 launching today/tomorrow; gated on tests-bal@v7.2.0 release
ethrex, Nethermind, Nimbus passing tests; Besu missing some tests; Geth branch not ready until mid-week
glamsterdam-devnet-4 requires separate branch from bal-devnet-7 due to engine API gas limit change (PR #796); Nethermind and Erigon already done

testing_progress.highlight: tests-bal@v7.2.0 releasing post-call; adds ~9 new AT37 tests clients must pass before joining bal-devnet-7
Benchmarking moving to bal-devnet-7; clients urged to merge state access optimizations (batch I/O, state root calculation) urgently — blocker for final repricing numbers

repricing_and_eips.highlight: EIP-7904 (compute repricings) tentatively dropped — most clients exceed 100M gas/s target post-BAL optimizations
EIP-8038 and EIP-2780 targeted for glamsterdam-devnet-5 with placeholder numbers to de-risk implementation; final values pending benchmarks
EIP-8246 (remove self-destruct gas burn) targeted for glamsterdam-devnet-5; EIP-7708 lists it as a dependency

contract_code_size.highlight: EIP-7954 proposed to raise max contract code size from 32KB to 64KB; already CFI'd at 32KB, this bumps further
Consensus: target glamsterdam-devnet-5; benchmark all three values (32, 48, 64KB) before finalizing; do not change current devnet scope

ssz_engine_api.highlight: Two competing REST-SSZ Engine API proposals: PR #764 (Barnabas, minimal changes) vs PR #793 (Marius, cleaner REST structure); Nethermind and Erigon already merged #764
No resolution reached; decision deferred to ACDE Thursday; key debate is shipping fast vs. doing it cleanly

action_items.action: Client teams: report post-state root calculation optimization status in BAL Discord thread
Review and merge eth/71 devp2p PR #264 (mandatory for bal-devnet-7)
Decide between execution-apis PR #764 vs #793 (REST-SSZ Engine API)

decisions.decision: EIP-7954 (64KB code size) targets glamsterdam-devnet-5, not current devnet
SELFDESTRUCT removal deferred to next fork (Hegota); propose proper EIP for Bogota
bal-devnet-7 client participation gated on passing tests-bal@v7.2.0

targets.target: bal-devnet-7 launch: end of day May 18 or early May 19
glamsterdam-devnet-4: after bal-devnet-7 stabilizes; requires separate client branches
glamsterdam-devnet-5: EIP-8038, EIP-2780, EIP-8246, EIP-7954 (pending benchmarks)
